text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has won two G1 races at Tokyo
Racecourse, but she responds with a tense smile
when I compliment her aptitude for Tokyo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She recounts her experience of getting hopelessly
lost in a train station the first day she landed in
Japan.
